tagline: Apple、NeXT、Pixar 联合创始人
tagline_en: Co-founder of Apple, NeXT, and Pixar

tagline: Tesla、SpaceX、xAI 创始人
tagline_en: Founder of Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI

tagline: 标准石油创始人，美国首位亿万富翁
tagline_en: Founder of Standard Oil, America's first billionaire

tagline: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦副主席，巴菲特长期搭档
tagline_en: Vice Chairman of Berkshire Hathaway, Buffett's longtime partner

tagline: 诺贝尔物理学奖得主，杨-米尔斯理论创立者
tagline_en: Nobel Laureate in Physics, co-creator of Yang–Mills theory

tagline: NVIDIA 联合创始人兼 CEO，GPU 计算与 AI 革命推动者
tagline_en: Co-founder & CEO of NVIDIA, architect of the GPU computing and AI revolution

tagline: 微软联合创始人，盖茨基金会联合主席
tagline_en: Co-founder of Microsoft, Co-chair of the Gates Foundation

tagline: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦前 CEO 及董事长，"奥马哈的先知"
tagline_en: Former CEO & Chairman of Berkshire Hathaway, the "Oracle of Omaha"

tagline: 亚马逊创始人，Blue Origin 创始人
tagline_en: Founder of Amazon and Blue Origin

tagline: 美国国父，发明家、科学家、外交家、出版商
tagline_en: Founding Father, inventor, scientist, diplomat, publisher

tagline: 迪士尼帝国创始人，现代动画与主题乐园先驱
tagline_en: Creator of the Disney empire, pioneer of modern animation and theme parks

tagline: 卡内基钢铁创始人，《财富的福音》作者，现代慈善先驱
tagline_en: Founder of Carnegie Steel, author of 'The Gospel of Wealth', pioneer of modern philanthropy

tagline: 福特汽车创始人，流水线大规模生产的先驱
tagline_en: Founder of Ford Motor Company, pioneer of assembly-line mass production

tagline: 通用电气联合创始人，1093 项专利持有者，电灯、留声机、电影摄影机的发明者
tagline_en: Co-founder of GE, holder of 1,093 patents, inventor of the practical light bulb, phonograph, and motion picture camera

tagline: 沃尔玛创始人，现代折扣零售业的奠基者
tagline_en: Founder of Walmart, founder of modern discount retail

tagline: 索尼联合创始人，把 "Made in Japan" 从廉价标签变成质量符号
tagline_en: Co-founder of Sony, transformed "Made in Japan" from a cheap label into a symbol of quality

tagline: 台积电（TSMC）创始人，专业晶圆代工模式发明者
tagline_en: Founder of TSMC, inventor of the dedicated semiconductor foundry model

tagline: 英特尔三号员工与长期 CEO，《只有偏执狂才能生存》作者
tagline_en: Intel's third employee and longtime CEO, author of *Only the Paranoid Survive*

tagline: 华为创始人，中国民营科技企业的代表人物
tagline_en: Founder of Huawei, the icon of China's private tech industry

tagline: 阿里巴巴集团创始人，把中国带入电商时代
tagline_en: Founder of Alibaba Group, brought China into the e-commerce era
